libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For 2.0.0, use jakarta.activation.* imports and type names; do not copy the existing 1.2.x javax.activation imports or reachability type names verbatim.

deterministic_setup.reason:
The 2.0.0 API jar contains jakarta.activation classes such as MimetypesFileTypeMap and MailcapCommandMap, but those classes reference com.sun.activation.registries.* implementation classes that are not packaged in jakarta.activation-api. input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8769 [Automation] javac compile fails for jakarta.activation:jakarta.activation-api:2.0.0; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: The matching implementation artifact also contains jakarta.activation public classes, so tests should still verify the intended jakarta.activation-api version is the library under test via local Gradle/TCK behavior.
If tests only cover CommandInfo/DataHandler paths that do not touch MIME/mailcap registries, they may compile without the runtime implementation but miss common Activation behavior.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: jakarta.activation-api:2.0.0 is an API-only artifact whose normal runtime paths rely on implementation classes absent from the API jar.
